whatIsBitcoin.question: None Bitcoin ni iki koko?
whatIsBitcoin.text:
Bitcoin ni amahera ya kuri internet.

Arashobora koherezwa ningoga kandi mu buryo bwizewe hagati y'abantu babiri bose kw'isi — hatavuyemwo ibanki canke isosiyete iyo ari yo yose y'ivy'amahera.
whatIsBitcoin.title: None Bitcoin ni iki koko?

Satelite ntoya
Injangwe yo mu kirere 🐱🚀
feedback: Nibyo. Uhejeje kwunguka sats 2 zindi!!

sat.question: Nahejeje kwunguka "Sat". Ni iki?
sat.text:
"Sat" imwe ni igice gitoya kuruta cose ca bitcoin.

Twese turazi ko idolari imwe y'Amerika ishobora kugabanywa mu bicent 100. Mu buryo bumwe, Bitcoin imwe irashobora kugabanywa mu ma sats 100,000,000.

Mu vyukuri, ntukeneye kugira bitcoin yuzuye kugira ngo uyikoreshe. Urashobora gukoresha bitcoin waba ufise sats 20, sats 3000 — canke sats 100,000,000 (ubu wamenye ko bingana na bitcoin imwe).
sat.title: Nahejeje kwunguka "Sat". Ni iki?

answers: Kuri internet
Ku kwezi
Mu konti ya banki ya Leta
feedback: Nibyo. Uhejeje kwunguka sats 5 zindi.
Sibyo. Eeh… nibura si ubu ;)
Ntibigoye. Ongera ugerageze.
whereBitcoinExist.question: Bitcoin ziba hehe?
whereBitcoinExist.text:
Bitcoin ni uburyo bushasha bw'amahera. Irashobora gukoreshwa n'umuntu wese, igihe cose -- ahantu hose kw'isi.

Ntihagira reta canke intara kanaka biyijanye (nk'amadolari y'Amerika). Nta n'impapuro z'amahera, ibiceri vy'icuma canke amakarato y'ipirastike.

Vyose ni ivya kuri internet 100%. Bitcoin ni umuyunganiro w'amavidewo akoresha internet.

Bitcoin yawe ikwikorerwa neza n'umupfunyapfunyo kuri telefone yawe canke orudinateri!
whereBitcoinExist.title: Bitcoin ziba hehe?

answers: Umugwi w'abakoresha kw'isi yose bakora ku bushake
Mr Burns wo mu kiganiro The Simpsons
Reta y'Ubufaransa
feedback: Nibyo. Bitcoin ishobokeshwa n'abantu kw'isi yose bakoresha umupfunyapfunyo wa bitcoin ku ma orudinateri n'ama telefone yabo.
Iciyumviro gishimishije — ariko si co!
Ntibigoye. Nta sosiyete canke reta igenzura Bitcoin.
whoControlsBitcoin.question: Ni nde agenzura Bitcoin?
whoControlsBitcoin.text:
Bitcoin ntigenzurwa n'umuntu, isosiyete canke reta.

Ikoreshwa n'umugwi w'abakoresha -- abantu n'amasosiyete kw'isi yose -- bakoresha umupfunyapfunyo wa bitcoin ku ma orudinateri n'ama telefone yabo ku bushake.
whoControlsBitcoin.title: Ni nde agenzura Bitcoin?

answers: Oya — ntibigisha gukopiya canke gusubiramo agaciro ka bitcoin
Ego, urashobora gukopiya bitcoin nk'uko ukopiya ifoto ya kuri internet
Ego, ariko gukopiya bitcoin bisaba amavidewo adasanzwe cane
feedback: Ni vyo koko!
Urazi ko atari vyo. Ongera ugerageze.
Sibyo. Nta buryo na bumwe uwo ari we wese ashobora gukopiya, canke gukora igishusho ca bitcoin.
copyBitcoin.question: Nimba Bitcoin ari amahera ya kuri internet, umuntu ntashobora kuyikopiya — no gukora amahera y'ubuntu?
copyBitcoin.text:
Agaciro ka bitcoin ntikigera gakopiywa. Ni yo mpamvu Bitcoin ari ikintu gihambaye cane cashizwe!

Amadosiye menshi ya kuri internet — nk'ifoto ya iPhone, ururirimbo rwa MP3, canke inyandiko ya Microsoft Word — arashobora gukopiywa no gusangirwa mu buryo bworoshye.

Umupfunyapfunyo wa Bitcoin ubuza gukopiya — canke "gukoresha kabiri" — amahera ya kuri internet. Tuzosangira ingene ibi bikora inyuma!
copyBitcoin.title: Nimba Bitcoin ari amahera ya kuri internet, umuntu ntashobora kuyikopiya — no gukora amahera y'ubuntu?

answers: Kubera abantu bizera ko abandi bazogira agaciro kumwe k'amahera
Kubera mama wawe yakubwiye gutyo
Kubera impapuro y'idolari ifise agaciro k'inzahabu yayo
feedback: Nibyo. Ni vyo bituma amahera akora!
Ashobora kuba yaribibwiye. Ariko si yo nyishu y'ukuri hano!
Oya. Kera warashobora guhindura amadolari y'Amerika mu nzahabu. Ariko ivyo ntibikihari.
moneySocialAgreement.question: Kubera iki amahera afise agaciro?
moneySocialAgreement.text:
Amahera asaba abantu kwizera.

Abantu bizera impapuro z'amadolari ziri mu mufuko wabo. Bizera imibare iri mu konti yabo ya kuri internet. Bizera ko amahera ari ku karato ka kaduka azokora.

Kugira amahera bituma abantu bashobora kubigurisha canke kuronka ibikorwa mu buryo bworoshye.
moneySocialAgreement.title: Amahera ni isezerano ry'abenegihugu.

answers: Guhuza ivyo abantu bashaka
Guhuza umurango n'ijoro
Guhuza ukwezi gupfuka izuba
feedback: Nibyo. Amahera atuma ugura ikintu mu buryo bworoshye, utaharaniye uburyo bwo kwishura
Oya nkana, urazi ko atari yo nyishu.
Si vyo neza. Ivyo tubita igipfunyika c'izuba 🌚
coincidenceOfWants.question: Ni iyihe guhuza amahera akemura?
coincidenceOfWants.text:
Imyaka amajana ishize, imbere y'uko abantu bagira amahera, barahanahanira -- canke bakaharanira ingene bagurisha ikintu kimwe, mu kugurana n'ikindi kintu canke igikorwa.

Reka tuvuge ko washaka kurya mu gihereza, ukabwira nyene akareresto igihanzo. Ashobora kuvuga "oya" -- ariko nzakira ingofero eshatu, nimba uzifise.

Urashobora kwiyumvira ingene "ubutunzi bwo guhanahana" bwobaye bugoye cane!

Ariko, n'amahera, urashobora gushikiriza impapuro y'amadolari 20. Kandi urazi ko nyene akareresto azoyakira.
coincidenceOfWants.title: Amahera akemura "guhuza ivyo abantu bashaka"... Ni iki ivyo??

answers: Amabuye, amakurungu n'inzahabu
Amazu matomato ya Monopoly
Ibiceri vy'ishokola
feedback: Nibyo. Ibintu bidasanzwe kandi bitoroshye gukopiya vyarakoreshwa nk'amahera.
Ntibigoye. Birashobora kugira agaciro mu gukina — ariko si mu buzima bwa buri musi!
Oya. Birashobora kuba bitoshye. Ariko ntibishobora gukoreshwa nk'amahera.
moneyEvolution.question: Ni ibintu ibihe vyarakoreshwa kera nk'amahera?
moneyEvolution.text:
Imyaka ibihumbi ishize, abenegihugu bo muri Mikironeziya barakoresheje amabuye manini kandi adasanzwe nk'amahera yabo.

Kuva mu myaka ya 1500, amakurungu adasanzwe (abonetse mu mazi) yatanguye gukoreshwa mu bihugu vyinshi nk'amahera.

Kandi mu myaka ibihumbi, inzahabu yarakoreshejwe nk'amahera mu bihugu kw'isi yose -- harimwo n'Amerika (gushika mu 1971).
moneyEvolution.title: Amahera yarahindutse, kuva mu ntango y'ibihe.

answers: Kubera afise imiterere myiza -- nk'ukudahera, gusa n'ibindi no kugabanyika.
Kubera asa neza kandi aboneka neza.
Kubera ashobora kwinjira mu mufuko wawe
feedback: Nibyo. Imiterere myiza yindi irimwo kuba adasanzwe no gutwara neza.
Sibyo. Ivyo birashobora kuba bivyo, ariko ivyo vyonyene si imiterere myiza y'amahera.
Si vyo neza. Naho ibintu vyashobora gutwazwa, ivyo vyonyene si impamvu yo gukoreshwa nk'amahera.
whyStonesShellGold.question: Kubera iki amabuye, amakurungu n'inzahabu vyakoreshejwe nk'amahera?
whyStonesShellGold.text:
Eeh, ibintu bimwebimwe -- ariko si vyose -- vy'imiterere myiza y'amahera.

None ni imiterere iyihe ituma amahera aba "meza"?
Adasanzwe: ntiyagwira, canke ntivoroha gukopiya
Yemewe: biroroshye ku bantu kumenya ko ari ay'ukuri
Adahera: biroroshye kubungabunga, kandi ntihera canke ntisenyuka
Imeze kumwe: birashobora guhinduranywa n'ibindi bimeze kumwe
Bitwara neza: biroroshye gutwarwa
Bigabanyika: birashobora kugabanywa mu bice bito
whyStonesShellGold.title: Kubera iki amabuye, amakurungu n'inzahabu vyakoreshejwe nk'amahera kera?

answers: Amahera atuma abantu bagura ibintu n'ibikorwa uyu musi -- n'ejo.
Amahera atuma uja ku kwezi.
Amahera ni umuti w'ingorane zose.
feedback: Nibyo!
Sibyo. Naho ivyo bishobora guhinduka muri kazoza ;)
Si vyo neza. Naho abantu bamwebamwe bashobora kwizera ivyo, iyi nyishu ntishikiriza intumbero y'ibanze y'amahera.
moneyIsImportant.question: Kubera iki amahera ahambaye cane?
moneyIsImportant.text:
Buri wese arazi ko amahera ahambaye.

Abantu benshi bakorera igihe cabo n'inguvu zabo -- mu buryo bw'akazi -- kugira ngo baronke amahera. Abantu babigira kugira ngo bashobore kugura ibintu n'ibikorwa uyu musi -- no muri kazoza.
moneyIsImportant.title: Amahera ahambaye ku bantu

answers: Ibanki nkuru y'Amerika (Federal Reserve)
Mr Burns wo mu kiganiro The Simpsons
Umugabo afise imashini yo gucapa mu nzu yiwe
feedback: Nibyo. Reta y'Amerika irashobora gucapa amahera menshi uko ishaka igihe cose.
Sibyo. Naho vyasa nk'aho yama afise amahera menshi.
Oya. Naho abantu bamwebamwe bakora impapuro z'amadolari z'ikinyoma, si ibemewe n'amategeko!
moneyImportantGovernement.question: Ni nde ashobora gucapa amadolari y'Amerika mu mategeko, igihe cose ashaka?
moneyImportantGovernement.text:
Ubutunzi bw'uyu musi bushirwa mu buryo bw'ibihugu: Amerika, Ubuyapani, Ubusuwisi, Burezili, Noruveje, Ubushinwa, n'ibindi.

Bivanye n'ivyo, mu bihugu vyinshi, reta igenzura amahera.

Muri Amerika, Ibanki Nkuru (yitwa Federal Reserve, canke "Fed") irashobora gucapa, canke gukora, amadolari y'Amerika menshi igihe cose ishaka.

"Fed" ntikeneye uruhusha rw'umukuru w'igihugu, canke rw'inteko ishingamateka, kandi bidasanzwe rw'abenegihugu.

Iyumvire nimba wari ufise ubushobozi bwo gucapa amadolari y'Amerika igihe cose washaka — wokora iki??
moneyImportantGovernement.title: Amahera ahambaye kandi ku reta

answers: Akorwa n'itegeko rya reta mu gihugu kanaka.
N'umuyobozi w'ishami ry'ibanki y'aho.
Umuntu wo mu mukino wa Monopoly.
feedback: Nibyo. Ibanki nkuru ya reta ikora amahera ya fiat.
Sibyo. Ibanki y'aho ishobora gusa gucunga amahera yamaze gukorwa na reta.
Oya. Ongera ugerageze!
WhatIsFiat.question: Ni nde akora amahera ya fiat, nk'amadolari y'Amerika canke amafaranga y'Ubusuwisi?
WhatIsFiat.text:
Amahera yose y'ibihugu akwiragira uyu musi yitwa amahera ya "fiat". Harimwo amadolari y'Amerika, ama yeni y'Ubuyapani, amafaranga y'Ubusuwisi, n'ibindi.

Ijambo "fiat" ni iry'ikilatini rivuga "ku mategeko" -- bisobanura "ku itegeko ry'ikigega".

Ibi bisobanura ko amahera yose ya fiat -- harimwo n'idolari y'Amerika -- akorwa gusa ku itegeko rya reta.
WhatIsFiat.title: Amahera ya Fiat: Ni iki?

answers: Amahera yose ya fiat ahera agakoresherwa nabi n'abategetsi.
Amabanki y'aho ashobora kuba adafise ikibanza c'ukubika impapuro z'amadolari zose.
Ibiti bishobora kuba bidahagije kugira ngo bikore impapuro z'amadolari yiyongereyeko.
feedback: Nibyo. Mu mateka yose, reta ntizigeze zishobora kwirinda ubushobozi bwo gucapa amahera, kuko mu vyukuri nta deni zifise zo kuyasubiza.
Oya, ivyo ntibishoboka namba.
Ntibigoye. Ongera ugerageze.
whyCareAboutFiatMoney.question: Kubera iki nkwiye kwibaza reta igenzura amahera ya fiat?
whyCareAboutFiatMoney.text:
Nk'uko twabisangiye mu kibazwa cashize, Ibanki Nkuru y'Amerika ni Federal Reserve, canke "Fed".

Fed irashobora gucapa amadolari menshi igihe cose -- kandi ntisaba uruhusha rw'umukuru w'igihugu, canke rw'inteko ishingamateka, kandi bidasanzwe rw'abenegihugu.

Kugenzura amahera birashobora kuba ikigeragezo kinini ku bategetsi -- kandi kenshi bituma habaho ikintu cikwega igiciro, gufata ata mpamvu n'ubuhemu.

Mu vyukuri, Alan Greenspan, umuyobozi w'ikibanza akomeye wa Fed, yaravuze ko Amerika "ishobora kwishura ideni ryose ifise, kubera dushobora gucapa amahera menshi kugira ngo tubigire".
whyCareAboutFiatMoney.title:
Nizera reta yanje.
Kubera iki nkwiye kwibaza ku mahera ya fiat?

answers: Gucapa amahera yiyongereye bituma habaho igiciro gikwega.
Abantu bategerezwa guhindura impapuro z'amadolari za kera ku banki buri mwaka.
Ishusho y'impapuro y'idolari irahinduka.
feedback: Nibyo. Ibi bisobanura ko ibintu n'ibikorwa bizogurwa amahera menshi muri kazoza.
Oya. Impapuro z'amadolari za kera zigikora nk'izishasha.
Sibyo. Naho reta ishobora gutanga ishusho nshasha ku mpapuro, ivyo nta sano bifise no kwongera amahera.
GovernementCanPrintMoney.question: Bisobanura iki iyo reta icapye amahera?
GovernementCanPrintMoney.text:
Eeh, umuntu wese akwiye kwibaza!

Imigenzo ya reta yo gucapa amahera -- canke kwongera amadolari -- ituma habaho igiciro gikwega.

Igiciro gikwega ni uko ibintu n'ibikorwa biba birengeye mu giciro. Mu yandi majambo, igiciro c'ikintu muri kazoza kizoba kirenze ic'uyu musi.

None igiciro gikwega bisobanura iki ku benegihugu?

Mu Bwongereza, Ipawundi Sterling yabuze 99.5% y'agaciro kayo kuva yashirwaho imyaka irenga 300 ishize.

Muri Amerika, idolari yabuze 97% y'agaciro kayo kuva Intambara ya Mbere y'Isi yose irangiye, hashize nk'imyaka 100.

Ibi bisobanura ko inyama yagurwa ku $0.30 mu 1920... yari $3 mu 1990… kandi nk'$15 uyu musi, mu mwaka wa 2020!
GovernementCanPrintMoney.title: Ni nde akwiye kwibaza ko reta ishobora gucapa amahera adafise imbibe?

answers: Amahera yose ya fiat yigeze kubaho yabuze agaciro kanini.
Agaciro kaguma kumwe ibihe bidahera.
Ishusho n'imiterere y'impapuro z'amahera ihindurwa buri myaka 10.
feedback: Nibyo. Ibi ni vyo naho ku dolari y'Amerika, yabuze 97% y'agaciro kayo mu myaka 100 ishize.
Sibyo. Ongera ugerageze.
Si vyo neza. Naho ishusho y'impapuro ishobora guhinduka, ivyo nta sano bifise n'agaciro kayo.
FiatLosesValueOverTime.question: Bigenda gute ku gaciro k'amahera yose ya fiat mu gihe?
FiatLosesValueOverTime.text:
Ni vyo.

Mu mateka y'isi, habaye amahera ya fiat 775 yakorejwe. Menshi ntakiriho, kandi ubuzima busanzwe bw'amahera ya fiat ni imyaka 27 gusa.

Ipawundi y'Ubwongereza ni yo mahera ya fiat mashaje kuruta. Yabuze hejuru ya 99% y'agaciro kayo kuva 1694.

Nta karorero na kamwe k'amahera ya fiat yagumije agaciro kayo mu gihe. Iki ni igiciro gikwega.
Mu vyukuri ni uburyo bwo kwiba amahera yawe mwabonye akuya!
FiatLosesValueOverTime.title: Ivyo bisobanura ko amahera yose ya fiat abura agaciro mu gihe?

answers: Amahera abananiye gutwarwa kw'isi yose, kandi arashobora no gukurikiranwa.
Amahera ntakenewe mu kinjana ca 21.
Amahera ni imizi y'ikibi cose.
feedback: Nibyo. Tuzosigura vyinshi ku ngorane izi mu bice vy'ibibazo bikurikira. Komeza utohoza!!
Inyishu itabaye. Urazi ko atari vyo.
Naho bamwe bashobora kwizera gutyo, si yo nyishu turiko turondera hano.
OtherIssues.question: Ni izihe ngorane zindi ziri ku mahera ya fiat?
OtherIssues.text:
Ego, hari ingorane nyinshi zindi ziri ku mahera ya fiat y'uyu musi.

Ica mbere, birashobora kuba bigoye cane gutwarira amahera kw'isi yose. Kenshi, reta ribuza mu buryo butaziguye gutwarwa -- kandi rimwe na rimwe igafata amahera -- ata mpamvu yumvikana canke insiguro. Kandi n'iyo ushobora kohereza amahera, amafaranga menshi y'ibikorwa abituma biba birengeye.

Ica kabiri, naho muri Amerika, habaye ukubura ibanga kuzuye, kubera ibikorwa vy'ubucuruzi vyinshi bikorwa n'amakarato y'amahera n'ayo kwishura, hamwe na kuri internet n'uburyo bundi nka PayPal na Apple Pay.

Wigeze ubona igisakuzo kiboneka mu mbuga zawe nkoranyambaga canke mu Gmail gato nyuma yo gushaka igicuruzwa kanaka? Ibi vyitwa "gukurikirana ubutunzi", kandi bishingiye ku masosiyete yagurishije amakuru yawe y'amahera.
OtherIssues.title: Nibyo, amahera ya fiat abura agaciro mu gihe. Hari izindi ngorane?

answers: Ego. Ntihazokwigera habaho bitcoin zirenze miliyoni 21.
Oya. Reta irashobora gukora bitcoin zindi igihe cose.
Oya, umupfunyapfunyo wa bitcoin urashobora guhindurwa kugira ngo bitcoin zindi zishobore gukorwa.
feedback: Nibyo. Mu kugabanya ingano ishobora gukorwa, Bitcoin yagizwe kugira ngo yongere agaciro mu gihe.
Inyishu itabaye. Reta nta bubasha ifise kuri Bitcoin.
Sibyo. Imwe mu miterere y'ibanze ya bitcoin ni uko ingano izira burundu.
LimitedSupply.question: Ingano ya bitcoin izira burundu?
LimitedSupply.text:
Reta irashobora gucapa amahera ya fiat ata mbibe.

Ariko, ingano ya Bitcoin igumye — kandi ntishobora kurenza bitcoin miliyoni 21.

Ingano y'amahera ya fiat idahwera yongera igiciro gikwega. Ibi bisobanura ko amahera ufise uyu musi afise agaciro gake muri kazoza.

Urugero rumwe rusobanuka:
Umukate wagurwa ku bicent 8 mu 1920. Mu mwaka wa 1990 umukate umwe wagurwa nk'idolari $1.00, kandi uyu musi igiciro gisanzwe nk'$2.50!

Ingano y'ibanze ya bitcoin ifise ingaruka izinyuranye, iy'ukwigabanya kw'igiciro.

Ibi bisobanura ko bitcoin ufise uyu musi yagizwe kugira ngo igire agaciro kenshi muri kazoza — kubera idasanzwe.
LimitedSupply.title:
Imiterere Idasanzwe #1:
Ingano y'Ibanze

answers: Oya. Bitcoin ni "igakwiragiye" rwose.
Ego. Igenzurwa na ONU (Ishirahamwe ry'Abibumbye).
Ego. Igenzurwa n'amabanki manini kuruta kw'isi.
feedback: Nibyo. Nta sosiyete, reta canke ishirahamwe rigenzura bitcoin. Umuntu wese arashobora gukoresha bitcoin — bose bakeneye ni telefone n'intungane ya internet.
Inyishu itabaye. Ongera ugerageze.
Sibyo. Ubu wamaze kumenya ko atari vyo!
Decentralized.question: Bitcoin igenzurwa ahantu hamwe?
Decentralized.text:
Amahera ya fiat agenzurwa n'amabanki na reta — ni co gituma abantu abita amahera "agenzurwa ahantu hamwe".

Bitcoin ntigenzurwa n'umuntu, reta canke isosiyete — ivyo bituma iba "igakwiragiye".

Kutarimwo amabanki bisobanura ko nta muntu ashobora kukwima bitcoin — kubera ubwoko, igitsina, umushahara, amateka y'ideni, ahantu uherereye — canke ikindi kintu icose.

Umuntu wese — ahantu hose kw'isi — arashobora gukoresha Bitcoin igihe cose ashaka. Ibikenewe gusa ni orudinateri canke telefone, n'intungane ya internet!
Decentralized.title: Imiterere Idasanzwe #2: Igakwiragiye

NoCounterfeitMoney.question: Abantu barashobora gukora Bitcoin y'ikinyoma?
NoCounterfeitMoney.text:
Impapuro z'amahera, ama sheki n'ibikorwa vy'amakarato y'igiciro vyose birashobora gukorwa ikinyoma.

Umupfunyapfunyo wihariye ukoresha umuyunganiro wa Bitcoin ubuza gusubiramo amahera ku ntumbero y'ikinyoma.

Bitcoin nshasha ishobora gusa gukorwa nimba hari isezerano hagati y'abitavye umuyunganiro. Abantu bakoresha umupfunyapfunyo wa bitcoin ku ma orudinateri n'ama telefone yabo ku bushake.

Ibi biha icemeza ko bidashoboka gukora bitcoin y'ikinyoma.
NoCounterfeitMoney.title:
Imiterere Idasanzwe #3:
Nta Mahera y'Ikinyoma

HighlyDivisible.question: Ingano ntoya kuruta yose ya Bitcoin umuntu ashobora kugira, canke gukoresha ni iyihe?
HighlyDivisible.text:
Amahera ya fiat ya kera ashobora gukoreshwa mu ngano ntoya nk'isenti imwe — canke uduce tubiri nyuma y'akadomo ku dolari imwe y'Amerika ($0.01).

Ariko, Bitcoin irashobora kugabanywa inshuro 100,000,000. Ibi bisobanura ko ushobora gukoresha nk'₿0.00000001. Uzobona ikimenyetso "₿", ni ikimenyetso ca Bitcoin kisa na "$". Rimwe na rimwe uzobona kandi igikoresho BTC, aho kuba ₿.

Mu bundi buryo, Bitcoin irashobora gucunga amahera mato cane — mbere n'ayo munsi y'isenti imwe y'Amerika!
HighlyDivisible.title:
Imiterere Idasanzwe #4:
Igabanyika Cane

securePartOne.question: Umuyunganiro wa Bitcoin wizwe?
securePartOne.text:
Umuyunganiro wa bitcoin ugira agaciro karenze imiliyari $100 uyu musi. Bivuye kuri ivyo, umuyunganiro utegerezwa kuba wizwe cane — kugira ngo amahera atigeze yibwa.

Bitcoin imenywa nk'icashirwaho ca mbere c'amahera y'ubuhanga kw'isi.

"Ubuhanga" mu izina rivuye mu gufunga amakuru. Mu bisanzwe, gufunga amakuru gukingira amakuru biciye mu mibare igoye cane.

Abantu benshi ntibazi — ariko Bitcoin ni umuyunganiro w'orudinateri wizwe kuruta kw'isi yose!

(ushobora kuba warumvise ivy'"inkorabara" za bitcoin — izo tuzozisigura mu kibazwa gikurikira)

securePartTwo.question: Bitcoin yigeze iterwa n'inkorabara?
securePartTwo.text:
Kuvuga ibigoye: umuyunganiro wa bitcoin ubwawe ntiwigeze utezwa n'inkorabara. Nta na rimwe.

None ni ibiki koko vyatewe n'inkorabara?

Ibisandugu bimwebimwe vy'amahera ya kuri internet bidafise umutekano ubereye.

Nk'uko igisandugu gisanzwe gifata amahera ya fiat (mu buryo bw'impapuro), ibisandugu vya kuri internet bifata bitcoin.

Mu buzima bwa buri musi, abajura biba amabanki — bakagenda n'amadolari y'Amerika. Ukuri ko umuntu yibiye ibanki nta sano gufise n'uko idolari y'Amerika ari amahera adahinduka canke yizewe.

Mu buryo bumwe, abajura bamwe b'orudinateri baribiye bitcoin mu bisandugu vy'amahera ya kuri internet bidafise umutekano — ibisa n'ukwiba ibanki kuri internet.

Ariko, bihambaye kumenya ko umuyunganiro wa bitcoin ubwawo ntiwigeze utezwa canke uhagaritswa!

feedback: Urahiriwe! Warashoboye. Ibintu bikunzwe vyarakoreshejwe igihe kirekire nk'uburyo bwo kubika no kwimura ubutunzi, nk'uko Bitcoin ikoreshwa uyu musi nk'amahera ya kuri internet akwiragiye.
Ikibabaje, ibintu bikunzwe si ivyo kwishimisha gusa - bifise intumbero y'imbere cane
Naho ibintu bikunzwe bishobora kuba ikimenyetso c'ikibanza ku bamwe, hari vyinshi kuruta kwiyerekana gusa.
originsOfMoney.question: Intumbero nyamukuru y'ibintu bikunzwe mu buhinga bw'ihinduka ni iyihe?
originsOfMoney.text:
Imiryango ya mbere y'abantu yarakoresheje uguhanahana mu bucuruzi, ariko ubu buryo bwari bufise imbibe nyinshi. Ikibazo kimwe cari "guhuza ivyo abantu babiri bashaka", aho abantu babiri bategerezwa gushaka ikintu kimwe mu gihe kimwe kugira ngo barangize uruhanahano.

Kugira ngo batsinde iki kibazo, abantu batanguye gukusanya no guha agaciro ibintu bimwebimwe kubera ko bidasanzwe kandi bifise ikimenyetso, nk'amakurungu, amenyo y'ibikoko, n'amabuye.

Ibi bintu bikunzwe vyari uburyo bwo kubika no kwimura ubutunzi ku bantu ba kera, bikabaha inyungu mu buhinga bw'ihinduka kurusha ubundi bwoko nka Homo neanderthalensis.
originsOfMoney.title: Inkomoko y'amahera

answers: Kubika agaciro
Gukoreshwa nk'uburyo bwo kwidagadura
Gukoreshwa nk'uburyo bwo guhanahana
feedback: Urahiriwe! Uri ku mahera (turakina ku majambo). Ibintu bikunzwe vyari ikibiko c'agaciro mu miryango ya kera, nk'uko Bitcoin ikoreshwa uyu musi nk'ikibiko c'agaciro ca kuri internet.
Ikibabaje, ibintu bikunzwe bishobora kuba bishimishije gukusanya, ariko vyari bifise intumbero y'ibikorwa cane mu miryango ya kera.
Ibintu bikunzwe ntibyakoreshwa kenshi nk'amahera y'uyu musi, rero ntibyari bifise uruhara rumwe nk'uburyo bwo guhanahana.
primitiveMoney.question: Intumbero nyamukuru y'ibintu bikunzwe mu miryango ya kera yari iyihe?
primitiveMoney.text:
Ibintu bikunzwe vyari intangamwuga y'amahera mu guha abantu ubushobozi bwo gucuruza hagati y'imigwi itandukanye no kwimura ubutunzi hagati y'imilongo. Naho bidakoreshwa kenshi nk'amahera y'uyu musi mu miryango ya kera, ibintu bikunzwe vyaguma ari ikibiko c'agaciro kandi rimwe na rimwe vyashobora gutuma habaho uruhanahano.

Amahera ya kera, nk'ibintu bikunzwe, yari afise ubwihuta buke ugereranije n'amahera y'uyu musi kandi ashobora kuba yarimutse incuro nkeyi gusa mu buzima bw'umuntu. Ariko, ibintu bikunzwe bimara igihe biherezwa mu milongo yagira agaciro kanini ku mwimurwa wose kandi rimwe na rimwe vyatuma uruhanahano rushoboka.
primitiveMoney.title: Amahera ya kera

answers: Ubushobozi bwo kugura ibintu bikunzwe ku giciro gito imbere y'uko bishakwa cane
Ubushobozi bwo guhanahana ibintu bikunzwe n'ibindi bintu bikenewe
Ubushobozi bwo gushimisha abandi n'igikumba c'ibintu bidasanzwe
feedback: Urahiriwe, ni vyo! Bisa n'uko iciyumviro co "kugura ku giciro gito, kugurisha ku giciro kinini" atari icashizwe mu bihe vya vuba, kuko n'abantu ba kera bashaka kuronka ibintu bikunzwe ku giciro gito imbere y'uko agaciro kabo n'ubucuruzi bwabo bwiyongera.
Ikibabaje, si yo nyishu ibaye. Naho ubushobozi bwo guhanahana ibintu bikunzwe n'ibintu bikenewe bwashobora kuba inyungu yo gutegura neza igishakwa, si co cari cingenzi.
Ntituri bwemere ko iyo ari yo nyishu ibaye. Naho kugira igikumba c'ibintu bidasanzwe bishobora kuba ishingiro ry'ubwibone, si co cari cingenzi.
anticipatingDemand.question: Inyungu nyamukuru yo gushobora gutegura igishakwa c'ibintu bikunzwe muri kazoza mu miryango ya kera yari iyihe?
anticipatingDemand.text:
Guhitamwo ibintu vyo gukusanya canke gukora cari ikibazo gikomeye ku bantu ba kera, kubera bategerezwa gutegura ibintu bizoshakwa n'abandi. Ubushobozi bwo gutegura neza ibintu bizoshakwa ku gaciro kabo c'ibintu bikunzwe bwahaye inyungu nkuru ku mwene wabyo mu bushobozi bwabo bwo gucuruza no guterana ubutunzi.

Imigwi imwe y'Abanyamerika ba kera, nka Narragansetts, mbere yaritaho gukora ibintu bikunzwe bidafise akamaro k'ibikorwa, ariko vyari bihambaye mu bucuruzi.

Uko ikintu gikunzwe citeguwe mbere gushobora gushakwa muri kazoza, ni ko inyungu ku mwene waco iba nini, kubera gishobora kuronkwa ku giciro gito imbere y'uko gishakwa cane kandi agaciro kaco k'ubucuruzi kakiyongera uko igitigiri c'abagishaka kiyongera.
anticipatingDemand.title: Gutegura Igishakwa

answers: Iciyumviro gifasha imiryango guhitamwo ikibiko c'agaciro kimwe
Ubwoko bw'umutambo butera ubucuruzi n'igabanye ry'akazi
Igikoresho c'umuziki gituma biroroshye gucuruza no kwiharira mu bikorwa bitandukanye
feedback: Urahiriwe, ni vyo! Nash Equilibrium ni iciyumviro mu buhinga bw'imikino kivuga uko nta mukinnyi n'umwe ashobora kuronka inyungu mu guhindura ingingo yiwe. Mu guhitamwo ikibiko c'agaciro, gushikira Nash Equilibrium bisobanura ko umuryango wahisemwo ikibiko c'agaciro kimwe, ivyo bitorohereza cane ubucuruzi n'igabanye ry'akazi.
Ikibabaje, si yo nyishu ibaye. Naho Nash Equilibrium idafitaniye isano n'umutambo, ni iciyumviro gihambaye mu buhinga bw'imikino gishobora kungukiriza umuryango.
Ntituri bwemere ko iyo ari yo nyishu ibaye. Naho umuziki ushobora guteranya abantu no gutuma bafashanya, Nash Equilibrium nta sano ifise n'ibikoresho vy'umuziki.
nashEquilibrium.question: Nash Equilibrium ni iki kandi inungukiriza gute umuryango?
nashEquilibrium.text:
Kuronka ikintu mu kwizigira ko kizoshakwa nk'ikibiko c'agaciro muri kazoza birashobora kwihutisha ko gifatwa mu ntumbero iyo. Ubu buryo burashobora gukora ingata y'inyishu ituma imiryango ihitamwo ikibiko c'agaciro kimwe.

Mu buhinga bw'imikino, ibi bimenywa nka "Nash Equilibrium". Gushikira Nash Equilibrium ku kibiko c'agaciro birashobora kungukiriza cane umuryango, kubera bituma ubucuruzi n'igabanye ry'akazi biroroshye kandi bigatunganya inzira y'iterambere ry'umuryango.
nashEquilibrium.title: Igufunguro ryo Gutuma Ubucuruzi Buroroshye

answers: Kwongera ubushobozi bwo kugura bw'itunga ryabo

feedback: Nibyo! Abacuruzi n'abadandaza bari bafise impamvu yo gutera imbere gufata ikibiko c'agaciro c'ahantu handi mu muryango wabo kuko vyongerera ubushobozi bwo kugura bw'itunga ryabo. Ibi ntibinungukira abacuruzi gusa, ariko n'umuryango wose, kubera gufata ikibiko c'agaciro kimwe bigabanya igiciro co gurangiza ubucuruzi n'indi miryango kandi bigongera ubutunzi bw'ubucuruzi.
Ikibabaje, si yo nyishu ibaye. Naho kwiga ku mico n'imiryango itandukanye bishobora kuba inyungu y'inyongera yo gutera imbere gufata ikibiko c'agaciro c'ahantu handi, si yo mpamvu nyamukuru.
Ntituri bwemere ko iyo ari yo nyishu ibaye. Naho kwiyerekana ubutunzi n'ikibanza bishobora kuba impamvu ku bantu bamwebamwe, si yo mpamvu nyamukuru.
singleStoreOfValue.question: Kubera iki abacuruzi n'abadandaza mu miryango ya kera bari bafise impamvu yo gutera imbere gufata ikibiko c'agaciro c'ahantu handi mu muryango wabo?
singleStoreOfValue.text:
Uko imiryango y'abantu n'inzira z'ubucuruzi zahinduka mu gihe, ibikumba vy'agaciro vyavutse mu miryango itandukanye vyatanguye guhiganira. Abacuruzi n'abadandaza bategerezwa guhitamwo ko babika inyungu zabo mu kibiko c'agaciro c'umuryango wabo canke mu kibiko c'agaciro c'umuryango bacuruzanye, canke igiteranyo c'ivyo vyompi.

Kufata itunga mu kibiko c'agaciro c'ahantu handi byahaye abacuruzi ubushobozi bwo gurangiza ubucuruzi mu buryo bworoshye muri uwo muryango, kandi bikabaha impamvu yo gutera imbere gufata ico kibiko c'agaciro mu muryango wabo bwite, kubera vyongerera ubushobozi bwo kugura bw'itunga ryabo.

Iyo imiryango ibiri ifashe ikibiko c'agaciro kimwe, ibona ko igiciro co gucuruzanira kigabanuka cane kandi ubutunzi bw'ubucuruzi bukiyongera. Mu kinjana ca 19, isi yose hafi yahurijwe ku kibiko c'agaciro kimwe – inzahabu – kandi ico gihe cabonye iyongera rinini kuruta ry'ubucuruzi mu mateka.
singleStoreOfValue.title: Inyungu zo Guhuza ku Kibiko c'Agaciro Kimwe

answers: Ukudahera, gutwara neza, guhinduranya, gushimikiza, kugabanyika, kudasanzwe, amateka maremare, n'ukudahonyanga

Kudasanzwe, kuba bisa neza, n'agaciro k'ivyiyumviro
feedback: Ego! Ikibiko c'agaciro ciza gikwiye kugira imiterere nk'ukudahera, gutwara neza, guhinduranya, gushimikiza, kugabanyika, kudasanzwe, amateka maremare, n'ukudahonyanga. Iyi miterere ituma biroroshye gukoreshwa nk'uburyo bwo guhanahana no kubika agaciro, kandi igongera igishakwa mu gihe.
Ikibabaje, si yo nyishu ibaye. Naho kuba gutoshye, kiryoshe n'ibindi bishobora kuba vyiza mu bindi bintu, ntibishoborwa gufatwa nk'imiterere ihambaye y'ikibiko c'agaciro.
Ntituri bwemere ko iyo ari yo nyishu ibaye.
whatIsGoodSOV.question: Ni imiterere iyihe ituma ikibiko c'agaciro kiza?
whatIsGoodSOV.text:
Iyo ibikumba vy'agaciro bihiganira, imiterere ituma ikibiko c'agaciro kiza ikiha ubushobozi bwo gutsinda abahiganwa kandi igongera igishakwa mu gihe.

Ibintu vyinshi vyarakoreshejwe nk'ibikumba vy'agaciro ariko imiterere imwimwe iranashimishije cane kandi ituma ibintu ivyo bitagira intsinzi.

Ikibiko c'agaciro ciza gikwiye kudahera, gutwara neza, guhinduranya, gushimikiza, kugabanyika, kudasanzwe, kugira amateka maremare, no kudahonyanga.
whatIsGoodSOV.title: Ibikumba vy'agaciro bimwe biruta ibindi

feedback: Warashoboye. Umuyunganiro ukingira amahera ni kintu gihambaye mu gushinga ukudahera kwayo, cane cane ku mahera ya kuri internet nka bitcoin.
Oya, ikibabaje! Ishusho y'amahera igaragara mu vyukuri si ihambaye nk'ishirahamwe ribitanga canke umuyunganiro uwakingira.
Hafi, ariko si vyo! Ishirahamwe ritanga amahera mu vyukuri ni kintu gihambaye mu gushinga ukudahera kwayo.
durability.question: Ni ikihe kintu gihambaye mu gushinga ukudahera kw'ikibiko c'agaciro ciza?
durability.text:
Ikintu gikoreshwa nk'amahera ntikwiye guhera canke gusenyuka mu buryo bworoshye. Inzahabu imenywa ku kudahera kwayo kandi kenshi ibonwa nk'"umwami" muri ibi.

Igice kinini c'inzahabu yigeze gucukurwa canke gukorwa, harimwo n'inzahabu y'Abafarawo, kiracahari uyu musi kandi birashoboka ko kizoguma kiboneka imyaka myinshi indi. Ibiceri vy'inzahabu vyakoreshejwe nk'amahera kera biracafise agaciro kanini uyu musi.

Amahera ya fiat na bitcoin ni inyandiko za kuri internet zishobora kugira ishusho igaragara, nk'impapuro z'amahera. Ariko si ishusho igaragara y'ayo mahera ikwiye gufatwa mu maso ku kudahera kwayo, ahubwo ni ukudahera kw'ishirahamwe ribitanga.

Areta nyinshi n'amahera yazo vyaje biragenda mu myaka amajana, mu gihe izindi, nka dolari y'Amerika na pawundi y'Ubwongereza, zaramaze igihe kirekire. Bitcoin ntifise ishirahamwe ribitanga, rero ukudahera kwayo gushingiye ku muyunganiro uwakingira.
durability.title: Ukudahera ni imiterere ihambaye y'ikibiko c'agaciro ciza

feedback: Warashoboye. Ishusho igaragara y'ikintu si co kintu gituma ikibiko c'agaciro gitwara neza. Mu vyukuri, amahera ya kuri internet nka bitcoin ni yo bikumba vy'agaciro bitwara neza cane kubera bishobora kubikwa ku gikoresho gitoya no koherezwa mu bwihuta ahantu ha kure.
Ikibabaje, ivyo si vyo! Ubushobozi bwo gutwara neza no kubika mu vyukuri ni kintu gihambaye gituma ikibiko c'agaciro gitwara neza.
Ewe, si yo nyishu ibaye! Ubushobozi bwo gutuma ubucuruzi bw'ahantu ha kure buroroshye mu vyukuri ni kintu gihambaye gituma ikibiko c'agaciro gitwara neza.
portability.question: Ni ikihe muri ibi bidakenewe kugira ngo ikibiko c'agaciro gitwara neza?
portability.text:
"Gutwara neza" bivuga ingene biroroshye kwimura canke gutwarira ikintu ahantu handi.

Bitcoin itwara neza cane, itemereza kubikwa ku gikoresho gitoya ca USB no koherezwa mu bwihuta ahantu ha kure. Mu buryo bumwe, amahera ya fiat nawo ni aya kuri internet kandi rero atwara neza, ariko amategeko ya reta n'ukugenzura amahera birashobora gutuma kwimura amahera menshi bigoye canke bidashoboka.

Ariko, inzahabu, kubera ari ikintu kigaragara kandi kiremereye cane, ni yo kibiko c'agaciro kitwara neza gake cane, aho igice kinini c'inzahabu kitigeze gitwazwa kandi kwimura inzahabu igaragara bikaba bigoye, birimo akaga kandi bifata igihe.
portability.title: Ikintu gikwiye kuba coroshye gutwara no kubika

Inyishu itabaye! Inzahabu irashobora kugira agaciro kurusha amadiyama, ariko si yo mpamvu nyamukuru ituma ibonwa nk'ifise ubushobozi bwinshi bwo guhinduranya.
Oya, ikibabaje! Naho inzahabu ishobora kugwira kurusha amadiyama, si yo mpamvu nyamukuru.
fungibility.question: Kubera iki inzahabu ibonwa nk'ifise ubushobozi bwinshi bwo guhinduranya kurusha amadiyama?
fungibility.text:
"Guhinduranya" bisobanura ko igice kimwe c'amahera gishobora guhinduranywa n'ikindi gice kimwe c'amahera amwe. Iyi ni imiterere ihambaye y'ikibiko c'agaciro ciza.

Inzahabu ni ikibiko c'agaciro gifise ubushobozi bwinshi bwo guhinduranya, kubera iyo ishonze, onsi imwe y'inzahabu ntishobora gutandukanywa n'iyindi iyo ari yo yose. Amahera ya fiat, mu rundi ruhande, ashobora kudafata neza imiterere yo guhinduranya ibihe vyose.

Nk'inzahabu, ibice vya bitcoin bishobora guhinduranywa, ariko hari uduciyumviro twose twerekeye ivyo. Tuzobiganirako mu gice gikurikira.
fungibility.title: Ikintu kimwe gikwiye guhinduranywa n'ikindi c'ingano ingana

Ikibabaje, ariko si vyo neza. Hari amahirwe meza ejo.
Ntibigoye! Bitcoin ni iya kuri internet rwose kandi ntikoresha impapuro z'amahera. Ongera ugerageze!
verifiability.question: Bitcoin ishobora gushimikizwa gute?
verifiability.text:
Bihambaye ko ikibiko c'agaciro ciza gishimikizwa mu buryo bworoshye ko ari ic'ukuri. Ibi biyongera ukwizera mu bucuruzi n'amahirwe ko ikikorwa kirangira.

Amahera ya fiat n'inzahabu bisanzwe biroroshye gushimikiza, ariko ntibidakora amakosa. Impapuro z'ikinyoma n'inzahabu y'ubwoko bwo tungistene vyarakoreshejwe guhenda abantu kera.

Mu rundi ruhande, gukoresha ubuhinga bwo gufunga amakuru bituma gushimikiza biroroshye cane kuri bitcoin kandi bikabangamira gukora ikinyoma.
verifiability.title: Ikintu gikwiye kuba coroshye gushimikiza mu bwihuta ko ari ic'ukuri

feedback: Warashoboye. Inzahabu igoranwa no kugabanywa mu bice bito ku bucuruzi bwa buri musi.
Ikibabaje, ariko si vyo neza. Bitcoin igabanyika cane mu gice cayo c'ibanze 'satoshi', kandi irashobora no kugabanywa mu milli-satoshi (1/1000 ya satoshi) ku Muyunganiro wa Lightning.
Oya. Naho amahera ya fiat atagabanyika nka bitcoin, agabanyika mu buryo bworoshye mu bice bito.
divisibility.question: Ni ikihe muri ibi atari ikibiko c'agaciro ciza kubera bigoranwa no kugabanywa mu bucuruzi bwa buri musi?
divisibility.text:
Ubushobozi bwo kugabanya ikintu ni imiterere ihambaye kugira ngo kibe ikibiko c'agaciro ciza.

Iyumvire ufise impapuro y'amadolari $100 ukaba ushaka kugura amashingiri agura ibicent 10. Intsinzi y'ubucuruzi ishingiye ku kuba uwugurisha afise igurane ry'$99.90 ico gihe.

Mu miryango aho ubucuruzi buri mu buryo bwinshi, ubushobozi bwo kugabanya ikintu mu bice bito butuma habaho uruhanahano rw'iciye hamwe kandi bigatuma biroroshye gukoreshwa mu bikorwa vya buri musi.

Bitcoin ifise akamaro kanini muri ibi, kubera ishobora kugabanywa gushika ku gice ca miliyoni ya umunani kandi ikoherezwa mu ngano ntoya kandi zijya hamwe.

Amahera ya fiat bisanzwe agabanyika gushika ku tuntu duto, bifise ubushobozi buto bwo kugura, bigatuma amahera ya fiat agabanyika mu buryo buhagije mu bikorwa.

Inzahabu, naho igabanyika mu buryo bw'umubiri, irashobora kugoranwa gukoreshwa mu ngano nto mu bucuruzi bwa buri musi.
divisibility.title: Ikintu gikwiye kuba coroshye kugabanya mu bice bito

Ikibabaje, ariko kugwira si yo miterere ihambaye kuruta y'ikibiko c'agaciro.

scarce.question: Ni imiterere iyihe ihambaye kuruta y'ikibiko c'agaciro?
scarce.text:
Ikibiko c'agaciro ciza gikwiye kugira ingano yibiwe, canke kudasanzwe.

Ibi ni kubera kudasanzwe gushobora gukora agaciro, kubera abantu kenshi bashaka ibintu bidasanzwe canke bitoroshye kuronka. Bitcoin, urugero, yagizwe kugira ngo igire ntarengwa ibice miliyoni 21, ivyo bihaye buri mwene wayo igice kizwi c'ingano yose ishoboka.

Mu bundi buryo, ingano y'inzahabu irashobora kwiyongera biciye mu buryo bushasha bwo gucukura, kandi amahera ya fiat kenshi ahindagurika mu giciro, bigatuma agaciro kagabanuka mu gihe.
scarce.title: Ikintu c'amahera gikwiye kudasanzwe

Ikibabaje, ariko ibi mu vyukuri ni impamvu ituma ikibiko c'agaciro kimaze igihe kirekire kidashobora gusimburwa. Hari amahirwe meza ejo.
Oya, ntibigoye.
establishedHistory.question: Ni impamvu nyamukuru iyihe ituma ikibiko c'agaciro kimaze igihe kirekire gishobora gusimburwa n'igishasha?
establishedHistory.text:
Ibi ni kubera ikibiko c'agaciro kimaze neza kidashobora gusimburwa n'igishasha, kiretse gifise inyungu nkuru ku gisanzwe.

Vyongeye, abantu ni ibisigarira vy'imigenzo kandi bakomeza gukoresha ibintu bamaze kumenya.

Inzahabu, urugero, ifise amateka maremare yo guha agaciro kandi yagumije agaciro kayo mu gihe. Mu bundi buryo, amahera ya fiat, ari icashizwe vuba, afise imigenzo yo kubura agaciro mu gihe kubera igiciro gikwega.

Bitcoin, naho imaze igihe gito gusa, yerekanye ukwihangana ku isoko kandi birashoboka ko izokomeza guha agaciro.
establishedHistory.title: Amateka ameze neza yo guha agaciro n'umuryango

feedback: Warashoboye. Umuyunganiro ukwiragiye, hagati y'abantu babiri wa Bitcoin utuma ibikorwa bikorerwa ata ruhusha, ivyo bituma iba ikintu gidahonyangwa.
Oya. Mu vyukuri, ibintu vy'umubiri kenshi bisaba uruhusha bwo kwambuka imipaka kandi bishobora gufatwa mu buryo bworoshye.

Ikibabaje, ariko ibinyuranye ni vyo. Uburyo bw'amahera ya fiat, bugenzurwa n'ibihugu, busaba umuntu kugira uruhara mu kumenyesha no gubuza imikoreshereze imwimwe y'ibintu vy'amahera, ivyo bituma bunyuranywe.
censorshipResistance.question: Ni ikihe kintu mu bihe bikurikira gituma Bitcoin ibonwa nk'ikintu gidahonyangwa?
censorshipResistance.text:
Ukudahonyanga ni imiterere yabaye ihambaye cane mu bihe vya kuri internet, kubera ivuga ingorane abandi bategetsi, nk'amasosiyete canke reta, bafise mu gubuza umuntu gukoresha ikintu kanaka.

Iyi miterere ifise agaciro kanini ku bantu baba mu ntwaro zigenzura amahera canke zibuza ubucuruzi bumwebumwe. Bitcoin kenshi ivugwa nk'ikintu gidahonyangwa kubera umuyunganiro wayo ukwiragiye, hagati y'abantu babiri, utuma ibikorwa bikorerwa ata ruhara rw'umuntu canke uruhusha.

Mu bundi buryo, uburyo bw'amahera ya fiat bugenzurwa n'ibihugu kandi busaba umuntu kugira uruhara mu kumenyesha no gubuza imikoreshereze imwimwe y'ibintu vy'amahera, nk'ukugenzura amahera.

Inzahabu, naho idasohorwa n'ibihugu, igoranwa gukwega ahantu ha kure kandi rero igenzurwa n'ibihugu mu buryo bwinshi.
censorshipResistance.title: Nta ruhusha rukenewe

evolutionMoney.question: Intumbero nyamukuru y'ubutunzi bw'amahera bw'uyu musi ni iyihe?
evolutionMoney.text:
Mu bihe vya vuba, abantu benshi mu butunzi bw'amahera bitaho iciyumviro c'uko amahera akoreshwa cane nk'uburyo bwo guhanahana ibintu n'ibikorwa.

Mu kinjana cashize, ariko, reta zari zifise ububasha bwihariye bwo gukora amahera kandi zarakomerejwe ko amahera aguma afise agaciro. Ibi vyatumye abantu bizera ko intumbero nyamukuru y'amahera ari ukuguranwa.

Bamwe bahanura ko Bitcoin atari amahera meza kubera agaciro kayo gahindagurika cane kugira ngo akoreshwe neza mu bikorwa.

Ariko, ubu buryo bwo kwiyumvira busubiye inyuma. Mu mateka yose, gukoresha amahera vyateye imbere intambwe ku ntambwe, agaciro kayo nk'ikibiko c'agaciro kabaye imbere yo gukoreshwa nk'uburyo bwo guhanahana.
evolutionMoney.title: Ihinduka ry'amahera

Ikibabaje, si yo nyishu ibaye. Ibiceri vy'umuringa n'ifeza ntibyakoreshejwe nk'amahera mu ntango y'ihinduka ryayo.
Ntibigoye! Ariko nibura uriko wiyumvira uburyo bwa vuba bw'amahera.
collectible.question: Ni ubuhe buryo bwa kera bw'amahera bwari buhimbaye kubera ishusho canke imiterere idasanzwe?
collectible.text:
Mu mateka yose, amahera yaciye mu ntambwe ine z'iterambere. Mu ntango nyene, abantu bashaka amahera kubera imiterere yayo idasanzwe gusa, kandi menshi yabonwa nk'ibintu vy'umurengero canke ibintu bikunzwe.

Urugero rw'ibi harimwo amakurungu, utugenegene n'inzahabu, vyose vyari ibintu bikunzwe imbere y'uko bikoreshwa cane nk'amahera.
collectible.title: Intambwe Ine z'Amahera: Ikintu Gikunzwe

storeOfValue.question: Ni igiki gishinga ubushobozi bwo kugura bw'ikibiko c'agaciro?
storeOfValue.text:
Ikibiko c'agaciro ni intambwe ya kabiri y'ihinduka ry'amahera. Iyo abantu bahagije bashaka amahera kubera imiterere yayo idasanzwe, aba uburyo bwo kubika no gufata agaciro mu gihe, no gutwarira ubutunzi bwakuye akuya muri kazoza.

Uko abantu benshi babona ko ikintu ari uburyo bwiza bwo kubika agaciro, agaciro k'ico kintu kiyongera uko abantu benshi bagishaka ku ntumbero iyo.

Amaherezo, agaciro k'ikibiko c'agaciro kazohagarara iyo kimaze gufatwa cane kandi abantu bake bashasha bakishaka nk'ikibiko c'agaciro.
storeOfValue.title: Intambwe Ine z'Amahera: Ikibiko c'Agaciro

mediumOfExchange.question: Umusi wa Pizza ya Bitcoin uhimbazwa kubera iki?
mediumOfExchange.text:
Iyo amahera akoreshejwe kubika agaciro, agaciro kayo kaguma bidahinduka amaherezo. Kandi iyo agaciro k'amahera kagumye, aba uburyo bwiza kuruta bwo gutuma ubucuruzi buroroshye kubera akoreshwa mu buryo bworoshye kandi adafise umuzigo wo guhanahana.

Mu misi ya mbere ya Bitcoin mu 2010, abantu bamwe ntibabona amahirwe abuze yo gukoresha Bitcoin nk'uburyo bwo guhanahana aho kuba ikibiko c'agaciro gishasha.

Hariho inkuru imenyerewe ya Laszlo Hanyecz yaguranye bitcoin 10,000 (zari zigera nk'imiliyoni $165 igihe iki candikwa) na pizza ebyiri gusa. Igihe Laszlo yaronka izo pizza, ni ubwa mbere bitcoin yagize agaciro ku isoko.

Uyu musi, pizza ya Laszlo ihimbazwa kw'isi yose ku ya 22 Rusama nk'Umusi wa Pizza ya Bitcoin nk'intambwe ihambaye mu hinduka rya bitcoin nk'amahera.
mediumOfExchange.title: Intambwe Ine z'Amahera: Uburyo bwo Guhanahana

Turasaba imbabazi, ariko naho ama glasi ari meza, si yo nyishu ibaye.
Gukina n'abagenzi birahimbaye burigihe, ariko ikibabaje si yo nyishu ibaye.
unitOfAccount.question: Bitcoin ishobora kubonwa gute nk'igipimo c'agaciro?
unitOfAccount.text:
Iyo amahera akoreshejwe mu guhanahana, ibintu bihingwa ku gaciro kayo. Ibi bisobanura ko ibintu vyinshi bishobora guhinduranywa n'amahera ku giciro kanaka.

Si ukuri kuvuga ko ibintu vyinshi bishobora kugurwa na bitcoin uyu musi. Urugero, naho igikombe c'ikawa gishobora kuboneka mu kugura ukoresheje bitcoin, igiciro canditswe si agaciro nyakuri ka bitcoin. Ahubwo, ni igiciro c'amadolari umudandaza ashaka, gihindurwa mu bitcoin gushingiye ku giciro c'uguhanahana ca buno hagati y'amadolari na bitcoin.

Nimba agaciro ka bitcoin kagabanuka mu madolari, umudandaza azosaba bitcoin nyinshi kugira ngo zingane ingano imwe y'amadolari.

Bitcoin ishobora gusa kubonwa nk'igipimo c'agaciro iyo abadandaza bemeye kuyakira nk'amahera yo kwishura batibaza ku giciro c'uguhanahana n'ayandi mahera.
unitOfAccount.title: Intambwe Ine z'Amahera: Igipimo c'Agaciro

Inyishu nziza, ariko ikibabaje si yo nyishu ibaye.
Si vyo neza, ariko bisa! Komeza wiyumvire.
partlyMonetized.question: Ijambo "gishirwaho ku gice" risobanura iki?
partlyMonetized.text:
Ibintu bitemewe mu buryo bwinshi nk'igipimo c'agaciro bishobora kwibonwa nk'"ibishirwaho ku gice" kubera bikoreshwa ku ntumbero zimwezimwe zijanye n'amahera, ariko si zose.

Inzahabu ni urugero rw'ikintu gishirwaho ku gice gikoreshwa kubika agaciro ariko gidakoreshwa mu buryo bwinshi nk'uburyo bwo guhanahana canke igipimo c'agaciro. Mu bihugu bimwebimwe, ibintu bitandukanye bishobora gukoreshwa ku ntumbero zitandukanye zijanye n'amahera.

Idolari ni urugero rw'ikintu gikoreshwa mu buryo bwinshi ku ntumbero zose eshatu z'amahera muri Amerika, mu gihe peso yari urugero rw'ikintu cakoreshwa nk'uburyo bwo guhanahana muri Arijantine ariko ntikiri ikibiko c'agaciro ciza kubera guhindagurika kwayo n'ukubura ubushobozi bwo kugura.
partlyMonetized.title: Gushirwaho ku Gice

feedback: Urahiriwe! Warashoboye. Wari uzi ko inzira ya Bitcoin yo kwemererwa mu buryo bwinshi nk'amahera isa n'inzira inzahabu yaciyemwo kugira ngo ibe amahera yemerewe mu buryo bwinshi?
Ha! Utegerezwa kuba wahunze igice cerekeye ko bifata imyaka myinshi Bitcoin gushikira iyi ntambwe. Komeza usome.
Turasaba imbabazi kukubwira, ariko Bitcoin iracari mu nzira yo kwemererwa mu buryo bwinshi nk'amahera.
monetizationStage.question: Intambwe ya buno y'ihinduka rya Bitcoin ni iyihe?
monetizationStage.text:
Bitcoin ubu iriko irahinduka kuva mu ntambwe ya mbere yo gukoreshwa nk'amahera gushika mu ntambwe ya kabiri. Birashobora gufata imyaka myinshi kugira ngo Bitcoin ikoreshwe nk'uburyo bwo gucuruza ibintu n'ibikorwa, nk'ayandi mahera.

Inzira ya Bitcoin yo kwemererwa mu buryo bwinshi nk'amahera ntirizwi, kubera inzira imwe yafashe igihe kirekire ku nzahabu kandi nta muntu akiriho yigeze abona ikintu caba amahera mu buryo bumwe nk'uko biriko bibera na Bitcoin. Nta bumenyi bwinshi ku yi nzira, ariko iterambere kw'isi yose rirerekana amahirwe kandi rikaba mu bwihuta mu bihe vya kuri internet.
monetizationStage.title: Bitcoin iri mu ntambwe yo gushirwaho

notFromGovernment.question: Amahera ni iki?
notFromGovernment.text:
Hari iciyumviro gikwiragiye kitabaye c'uko amahera ari icashizwe na reta kandi adashobora kubaho ata reta. Ibi si vyo.

Amateka y'amahera asubira inyuma imyaka ibihumbi mu bihe ata reta yariho, ariko amahera yariho.

Ibi bimenyesha ko amahera ashira ahagaze kandi ari ikintu gicuruzwa cane kuruta mu isoko. Si icashizwe na reta kandi bidasanzwe ntisaba reta kugira ngo amahera akore.
notFromGovernment.title: Amahera si icashizwe na reta

Ikibabaje, bisa n'uko wabisubije inyuma! Hari amahirwe meza ejo.
Ntibigoye! Ideni rimaze igihe nk'amahera, kandi birashoboka ko azogumaho.
primaryFunction.question: Intumbero nyamukuru y'amahera yari iyihe?
primaryFunction.text:
Amahera ya kera yabayeho imbere cane y'ubucuruzi bunini. Abashakashatsi babonye ko abantu ba kera bakoresheje ibikoresho vy'agaciro nk'imyampi, ibintu bikunzwe nk'amakurungu n'ibiterwa nk'ingano nk'amahera ya kera.

Inyungu nyamukuru n'intumbero y'ibanze y'ayo mahera ya kera yari uguteza imbere imikorere y'uburyo buto bwo guhanahana. Amahera ya kera yagize ivyo biciye mu gukuraho ubukenewe bwo guhuza abantu bashaka ibintu bimwe, inyungu, ingano canke ubuhanga. Vyongeye yagabanyije cane ubukenewe bw'ideni, ivyo mu bihe vy'imbere y'inyandiko, vyari bigoye gukurikirana.
primaryFunction.title: Intumbero nyamukuru y'amahera

Ikibabaje, bisa n'uko wari kure gatoyi ubu. Kumbure gerageza wibanze ku miterere y'amahera y'ibikorwa aho kuba ishusho yayo.
monetaryMetals.question: Ni iki catumye ibicuma biba vy'agaciro nk'amahera?
monetaryMetals.text:
Ibicuma vyari bigoye gukorwa, ivyo bigatuma bidasanzwe. Vyongeye vyamaze igihe kirekire kurusha ibindi bintu nk'amakurungu, imyumbati n'utugenegene. Ibi vyatumye biba ivy'agaciro kandi biroroshye gutwara.

Uko ubuhanga bwateye imbere, cane cane mu gukora ibicuma, abantu bashoboye gukora amahera ateye imbere cane, meza kuruta.
monetaryMetals.title: Ibicuma vy'amahera

answers: Igipimo c'ubwihuta ibice bishasha vy'amahera bishirwa mu ngano iriho.
Igipimo c'ukuguma neza kw'amafaranga y'isosiyete.
Igipimo gikoreshwa kugereranya agaciro k'amahera atandukanye.
feedback: Nibyo! Igipimo ca Stock to Flow girashobora kuba igikoresho gifasha gutahura ukuguma n'ukudasanzwe kw'amahera kanaka. Warakoreye neza.
Ikibabaje, bisa n'uko uriko uravanga amajambo y'ubucuruzi.
Ntibigoye! Ariko nibura uriko wiyumvira ubutunzi bw'isi yose.
stockToFlow.question: Igipimo ca Stock to Flow ni iki?
stockToFlow.text:
Igipimo ca Stock to Flow ni igipimo c'ubwihuta ibice bishasha vy'amahera bishirwa mu ngano iriho.

Kugira ngo ugipime, ugabanya ingano y'amahera ariho n'ingano ikorwa buri mwaka.

Kugira ngo ikintu kibe uburyo bwiza bwo kubika agaciro, gikwiye kwiyongera mu gaciro iyo abantu bashaka kukikoresha kubika, ariko abagikora ntibakwiye kwiyongera cane, ivyo bigagabanya agaciro kaco.
stockToFlow.title: Gutahura Igipimo ca Stock to Flow

answers: Ingorane yo gukora ibice bishasha vy'amahera.
Agaciro k'amahera ugereranije n'ayandi mahera.
Ingano y'amahera yose ari mu gukwiragira.
feedback: Ni byo! Ni ibishimishije kwiyumvira ingene ubukerebutsi bw'amahera bushobora guhinduka mu gihe uko ubuhanga butera imbere kandi ibintu vyari bigoye gukorwa bikaba biroroshye.
Ikibabaje, bisa n'uko wabisubije inyuma!
Ntibigoye! Ubukerebutsi bw'amahera bufitaniye isano n'ukubikorwa kurusha ingano yayo.
hardMoney.question: Ubukerebutsi bw'amahera ni iki?
hardMoney.text:
Ingorane yo gukora ibice bishasha vy'amahera ugereranije n'ayandi mahera yitwa ubukerebutsi bwayo. Ibi birashobora guhinduka mu gihe uko ubuhanga butera imbere kandi ibintu vyari bigoye gukorwa bikaba biroroshye.

Mu Gana y'imbere y'abakoroni (Afurika), utugenegene two mu gitirahure (bikozwe mu kirahure) twakoreshejwe nk'amahera. Gukora ikirahure cari ubuhanga buhenze muri ico karere, ivyo vyahaye utugenegene igipimo kinini ca stock-to-flow bigatuma bidasanzwe cane.

Mu kinjana ca 16, abashakashatsi b'i Buraya babonye agaciro kanini kashirwaho ku tugenegene n'Abanyafurika bo mu burengerazuba batangura kukuzana mu bihumbi vyinshi; kubera ubuhanga bw'i Buraya bwo gukora ikirahure bwatumye biba bigorohe cane gukorwa.

Buhorobuhoro, Abanyaburaya bakoresheje izo tugenegene zigorohe gukorwa kuronka ibintu vyinshi vy'agaciro vy'Afurika. Ingaruka y'uku kwinjira muri Afurika yari ukwimura ubutunzi bwinshi bw'ibidukikije bw'Afurika mu Banyaburaya no guhindura utugenegene kuva ku mahera akomeye gushika ku mahera yoroshye.

Uko imiryango yakomeza guhinduka, yatanguye kwisunga amahera y'ibintu nk'amabuye n'utugenegene two mu gitirahure igana ku bicuma vy'amahera.
hardMoney.title: Amahera Akomeye n'Amahera Yoroshye

convergingOnGold.question: Kubera iki isoko rigenga ryahisemwo inzahabu nk'amahera?
convergingOnGold.text:
Mu bicuma vy'amahera vyose, isoko rigenga amaherezo ryahisemwo inzahabu nk'amahera kubera ifise imiterere ibiri ihambaye igumiza agaciro kayo mu gihe kirekire no mu ntara nyinshi z'isi:

1) Inzahabu ntishobora gusenyvka, kandi

2) Inzahabu ntishobora gukorwa mu bindi bintu.

originsOfPaperMoney.question: Impapuro z'amahera zakoreshejwe ku ki mu gihe inzira z'ubucuruzi zikwira?
originsOfPaperMoney.text:
Inzahabu irashobora gukorwa mu biceri canke ibipande vy'uburemere n'ubwiza kanaka. Iyo inzira z'ubucuruzi zikwira, vyabaye vy'akaga gutwarira inzahabu nyinshi.

Nk'umuti, impapuro z'amabanki yizewe zishobora guhinduranywa n'inzahabu zarakoreshejwe. Mu mwaka wa 900 inyuma ya Kristu, abacuruzi b'Abashinwa batanguye gukoresha impapuro z'amahera kugira ngo birinde gutwara ibiceri ibihumbi ku nzira ndende. Batanguye gucuruza impapuro z'icemezo bivuye ku babikira aho bari bashize amahera canke ibintu.

Mu ntango izo mpapuro z'amahera zari zanditswe ku muntu kanaka, ariko vuba zarabaye itegeko ryo kwishura ingano ku muntu wese azifise. Izo mpapuro zishobora kubonwa nk'intangamwuga y'impapuro z'amahera z'uyu musi.
originsOfPaperMoney.title: Inkomoko y'Impapuro z'Amahera Zishigikiwe n'Inzahabu

fractionalReserve.question: Kubera iki Fractional Reserve Banking yateye imbere?
fractionalReserve.text:
Fractional Reserve Banking ni uburyo aho amabanki arekuriwe gufata igice gusa c'amahera yakiriwe nk'itunga ririnzwe, mu gihe ariko akoresheje ayasigaye mu gutanga amadeni.

Impamvu imwe ubu buryo bwateye imbere ni kubera abantu bashaka kwunguka amahera bivuye mu nzahabu yabo, aho kwishura kuyibika.

Bashobora kubigira mu guha ibanki canke ikibiko uruhusha rwo gutanga inzahabu yabo nk'ideni bakaronka inyungu.

Nimba abantu benshi bashize inzahabu kurusha abashaka kuyikura, ibanki yashobora kwunguka menshi mu gukoresha inzahabu imwe nk'itunga rishigikira amadeni menshi, bigatuma ifata igice gusa c'amadeni mu itunga ririnzwe.
fractionalReserve.title: Icashizwe c'Uburyo bwa Fractional Reserve Banking

bankRun.question: Ni ingaruka iyihe ishoboka iyo amabanki yasohoye impapuro z'amahera menshi kurusha ayo afise?
bankRun.text:
Amabanki rimwe na rimwe yarasohora impapuro z'amahera menshi kurusha ayo yari afise, ivyo vyashobora gutuma habaho ingorane mu butunzi. Nimba abantu batanguye gukekeranya ubushobozi bw'ibanki bwo kwishura amadeni, bashobora kwirukira gukura amahera yabo yose icanya imbere y'uko abandi babigize. Ibi vyitwa kwiruka ku banki.

Ukubura kwihuta kw'amahera bivuye mu kwiruka ku banki kwashobora kwerekana ko ibanki yari yarakoresheje cane Fractional Reserve Banking. Ibi vyashobora gutuma habaho ukubura amahera no guhagarika uburyo bw'amahera bwose.
bankRun.title: Ingorane za Fractional Reserve Banking

modernCentralBanking.question: Intumbero y'ibanki nkuru ni iyihe?
modernCentralBanking.text:
Kugira ngo bikemure ikibazo co kwiruka ku banki, reta zarashinze amabanki yazo bwite yitwa "amabanki nkuru".

Ayo mabanki nkuru afise ububasha bwihariye bwo gukora amahera. Akora nk'umugambi w'inyuma iyo amabanki y'ubucuruzi abuyeho itunga ririnzwe akaba akeneye amahera yiyongereye kugira ngo agume afunguye.

Kubera iki gikorwa, amabanki nkuru yitwa kandi "abatanga amadeni ba nyuma", bisobanura ko ashobora gukora no gutanga amahera iyo amabanki y'ubucuruzi akeneye amahera yo kwishura abakura amahera.
modernCentralBanking.title: Uburyo bwa Vuba bw'Amabanki Nkuru

goldBacked.question: Ikibazo kinini c'uburyo bw'inzahabu kuri reta n'abenegihugu cari ikihe?
goldBacked.text:
Kera, reta zimwezimwe zarahuza agaciro k'amahera yabo n'ingano kanaka y'inzahabu, uburyo bwamenywa nka "uburyo bw'inzahabu". Ibi bisobanura ko reta yategerezwa kugumana ingano kanaka y'inzahabu mu kigega kugira ngo isohoze ingano kanaka y'amahera.

Ubu buryo bwagabanije ubushobozi bwa reta bwo gutanga amadeni kubera ntiyashobora gucapa amahera menshi gusa kugira ngo bipfuke igiciro co gutanga amadeni. Reta kenshi zatanga amadeni kugira ngo zipfuke intambara canke ibindi bikorwa birengeye, ariko uburyo bw'inzahabu bwatumye bigoranwa kubigira batakusanije inzahabu ihagije yo gushigikira amahera mashasha bashaka gusohora.

Uburyo bw'inzahabu bwari kandi bubi ku benegihugu kubera ntibwatanga icemeza ico ari co cose c'uko amahera yabo mu banki azokingirwa, kubera agaciro k'amahera yabo kashingiye ku bushobozi bwa reta bwo kugumana itunga ryayo ry'inzahabu.
goldBacked.title: Kuva ku Nzahabu Gushika ku Zishigikiwe n'Inzahabu

feedback: Nibyo. Uburyo bwa Bretton Woods bwashizweho nyuma y'Intambara ya Kabiri y'Isi yose kugira ngo bukemure ukudahinduka kw'ubutunzi bw'isi n'amadeni menshi. Bwahuza agaciro k'amahera y'ibindi bihugu n'agaciro ka dolari y'Amerika, nayo yari ihuye n'agaciro k'inzahabu ku giciro kidahinduka.
Iciyumviro ciza, ariko si co c'ibikorwa. Canke woshima amahera yawe ashonga mu bwihuta cane? Ongera ugerageze.
Ahantu ho gusimba vyari gutuma abantu badatahura neza ibikorwa vy'uburyo bwa Bretton Woods. Wiyumviriye gukora nk'umujyanama kuri IMF canke Banki y'Isi? Ongera ugerageze!
brettonWoods.question: Intumbero nyamukuru y'uburyo bwa Bretton Woods yari iyihe?
brettonWoods.text:
Nyuma y'Intambara ya Mbere n'iya Kabiri y'Isi, ibihugu vyinshi vyari bidafise amahera kandi vyari bishize cane. Amerika yari ifise inzahabu nyinshi kubera yagurisha intwaro nyinshi n'ibikoresho vy'ingabo ku bindi bihugu mu gihe c'intambara. Bivuye kuri ivyo, Amerika yagenzura nk'ibice bibiri vya gatatu vy'inzahabu y'isi yose.

Kugira ngo ikemure ubutunzi bw'isi, habaye uburyo bushasha aho ibihugu vyohuza amahera yabyo n'agaciro ka dolari y'Amerika.

Idolari y'Amerika, nayo, yohuye n'agaciro k'inzahabu. Ibi bisobanura ko agaciro k'amahera y'ibindi bihugu kari gashingiye ku gaciro ka dolari y'Amerika, nayo yashingiye ku ngano y'inzahabu Amerika yari ifise.
brettonWoods.title: Uburyo bwa Bretton Woods

feedback: Nibyo! Amahera y'itunga ry'isi yose ni ubwoko bw'amahera akoreshwa cane mu bucuruzi bw'isi yose n'ibikorwa vy'amahera. Ni amahera ashimwa cane canke ashakwa cane yo gurangiza ibikorwa, kubera bisanzwe aguma kandi yemewe mu buryo bwinshi.
Naho impapuro z'amahera menshi zikozwe mu bipande vy'amabara bifise utuduce twaka nk'ikimenyetso c'umutekano, si vyo bishinga amahera y'itunga ry'isi yose. Ongera ugerageze.
Nta nkeka ibi vyari kungukiriza ingengo ya WTO cane, ariko si uko amahera y'itunga ry'isi yose ashingwa canke ahitamwo. Ongera ugerageze!
globalReserve.question: Amahera y'itunga ry'isi yose ni iki?
globalReserve.text:
Amahera y'itunga ry'isi yose ni ubwoko bw'amahera akoreshwa cane mu bucuruzi bw'isi yose n'ibikorwa vy'amahera. Ni amahera ashimwa cane canke ashakwa cane yo gurangiza ibikorwa, kubera bisanzwe aguma kandi yemewe mu buryo bwinshi.

Ihinduka ry'amahera y'itunga ry'isi yose rirashobora kugira ingaruka z'ivy'igihugu zikomeye, kubera rishobora kugira ingaruka ku bungene bw'ububasha hagati y'ibihugu.

Amahera y'itunga ry'isi yose akomeza bisanzwe yamaze ubuzima bw'imyaka mirongo, idolari y'Amerika iguma ari amahera y'itunga ry'isi yose akomeza mu gice kinini c'ikinjana ca 20.

nixonShock.question: Ni ibiki vyabaye ku buryo bwa Bretton Woods mu 1971?
nixonShock.text:
Uburyo bwa Bretton Woods bwari uburyo bw'amahera bwashizweho nyuma y'Intambara ya Kabiri y'Isi yose kugira ngo bukemure ukudahinduka kw'ubutunzi bw'isi n'amadeni menshi.

Muri ubu buryo, ibihugu vyinshi vyarahuze amahera yabyo ku gaciro ka dolari y'Amerika, nayo yari ihuye ku gaciro k'inzahabu ku giciro kidahinduka. Ibi bisobanura ko agaciro k'amahera y'ibindi bihugu kari kahuye ku gaciro k'inzahabu biciye ku dolari y'Amerika.

Mu 1971, Perezida w'Amerika Richard Nixon yategetse Kigega c'Amerika guhagarika guha reta z'ahantu handi ubushobozi bwo guhindura amadolari yabo mu nzahabu, inzira yitwa "guhindura".

Iherezo ry'ugucanwa ry'ukuhindura amadolari mu nzahabu ryatangaje isi kandi ryamenyekanye nka Nixon Shock, birangiza uburyo bwa Bretton Woods bw'igiciro kidahinduka. Byari intango y'uburyo bushasha bw'amahera bushingiye ku giciro gihindagurika.
nixonShock.title: Nixon Shock

fiatEra.question: Ijambo "fiat" risobanura iki iyo rikoreshejwe ku mahera?
fiatEra.text:
"Fiat" ni ijambo rivuye mu kilatini risobanura "nibikorwe". Iyo rikoreshejwe ku mahera, risobanura ko reta iriko irakora amahera biciye ku itegeko gusa.

Kuva Nixon Shock, amahera ya fiat ntashigikiwe n'inzahabu canke ifeza kandi ntashobora guhinduranywa ahantu hamwe n'ingano kanaka y'inzahabu, nk'uko byari bimeze kera.

Ibi bisobanura ko agaciro kayo kavuye ku kuba reta ivuga ko afise agaciro kandi abantu bizera ko bazoshobora kubakoresha kugura ibintu.

Vyongeye, reta kenshi zishira mu mategeko ko abadandaza bategerezwa kwemera ubu bwoko bw'amahera ya fiat kandi ko ari yo mahera yonyene ashobora gukoreshwa kwishura amakori.

digitalFiat.text:

Amahera ya fiat ya kuri internet yashobokeye n'ikwiragira ry'imiyunganiro ya kuri internet n'iyongereka ry'ibikoresho vy'abakoresha nk'orudinateri na telefone zishobora guhuza na iyo miyunganiro.

Amahera ya fiat ya kuri internet ariko asimbura amahera ya fiat agaragara kubera amafaranga make, ubwihuta bwinshi, n'ubushobozi bwiyongereye bwo gukurikirana. Mu yandi majambo, biroroha kandi byihuta gukoresha amahera ya fiat ya kuri internet kandi biroroshye gukurikirana ibikorwa bikoreshwa na yo.

plasticCredit.question: Ikarato y'igiciro ni iki?
plasticCredit.text:
Ikarato y'igiciro ni ubwoko bw'ikarato yo kwishura iha abantu ubushobozi bwo gutanga amadeni kugira ngo bishure ibintu. Iyo abantu bakoresheje ikarato y'igiciro, bariko bagurana amahera ku sosiyete y'ikarato y'igiciro kugira ngo bishure ibintu ubu, aho kubikira amahera yo kwishura ibintu nyuma.

Ibi vyatumye buhorobuhoro gutanga amadeni ku kugura bisanzwemuka, ikintu kigira ingaruka ku gihe c'ihitamwo ry'abakoresha. Aho kurindira kubikira amahera, icashizwe c'ikarato y'igiciro catumye bisanzwemuka ko abantu batanga amadeni kugura ibintu bashaka ningoga.

Uyu musi, hari nk'imiliyari eshatu z'ikarato z'igiciro zikoreshwa kw'isi yose.
plasticCredit.title: Ikarato y'Ipirastike

answers: Ubushobozi bwo kwemeza ko igice kimwe c'amahera ya kuri internet kidashobora gukoreshwa kurusha rimwe n'uwugifise
Icifuzo co gukora amahera ya kuri internet ashobora gukoreshwa gusa kuri Mars
Iciyumviro co guhemba ugukiranuka no gutuma ubuhemu buhenze cane
feedback: Warakoreye neza. Mu isi ya kuri internet, aho biroroshye gukopiya ibintu, bihambaye kwemeza ko igice kimwe c'amahera ya kuri internet ntikishobora gukoreshwa kurusha rimwe n'uwugifise. Ibi vyari ibihambaye mu gushiraho Bitcoin.
Si vyo neza, ariko amahera ya kuri internet ashobora gukoreshwa gusa kuri Mars yoshimishije nk'uburyo bwo gushigikira kwimuka ku mubumbe w'umutuku.
Oya, ariko iciyumviro co guhemba ugukiranuka no gutuma ubuhemu buhenze cane ni kintu gihambaye mu gushiraho uburyo ubu ari bwo bwose bw'amahera.
doubleSpendProblem.question: Ni igiki cari gihambaye mu gushiraho Bitcoin?
doubleSpendProblem.text:
Mu isi ya kuri internet, biroroshye gukopiya ibintu, rero bihambaye kwemeza ko igice kimwe c'amahera ya kuri internet ntikishobora gukoreshwa kurusha rimwe n'uwugifise.

Mu buryo bw'amahera bufise ubutegetsi bumwe (nka reta), iki kibazo gikemurwa mu buryo bworoshye mu kubika inyandiko y'ibikorwa icungwa n'ubutegetsi bumwe. Ariko, ibi bisanzwe bishikiriza ahantu hamwe h'intabire mu kuboneka no mu kwizera.

Mu buryo bukwiragiye, ikibazo co gukoresha kabiri kigoranwa cane gukemurwa. Abantu benshi baragerageje gukora amahera ya kuri internet atagenzurwa na reta, ariko bose bafise ibibazo vyabo bidasanzwe.

Satoshi Nakamoto yarafashe izi nyigisho zose mu kwibaza kandi ni we wa mbere yakemura ikibazo co gukoresha kabiri mu gushiraho Bitcoin mu gukora uburyo bukwiragiye buhemba ugukiranuka kandi butuma ubuhemu buhenze cane.
doubleSpendProblem.title: Ikibazo co Gukoresha Kabiri

feedback: Warakoreye neza. Bitcoin ikoresha uburyo bw'icemezo c'akazi aho ibikorwa bishirwa hamwe mu bipande bikahuza ku munyururu wa bloki. Mu buryo nk'ubwo, buri mukoresha arazi ko buri giceri gikoreshwa rimwe gusa.
Si vyo neza. Guhuza ivyo abantu bashaka ni ikibazo co guhanahana gishobora gukemurwa n'amahera. Ongera ugerageze.
Ha oya. Kugabanya muri bitcoin si ikibazo, ariko ni igice c'umuti Satoshi yagize! Ibindi bizogira mu Gice ca 302. Ongera ugerageze!
satoshisBreakthrough.question: Ni ikihe kibazo Satoshi yategerezwa gukemura kugira ngo ashire Bitcoin?
satoshisBreakthrough.text:
Umuti wa Satoshi ku kibazo co gukoresha kabiri wari intsinzi mu buhinga bw'orudinateri n'uburyo bukwiragiye. Gushika Bitcoin, benshi bizera ko bitoshoboka gukemurwa.

Umuti wiwe wahaye Satoshi ubushobozi bwo guteza imbere uburyo bushasha bw'amahera ya kuri internet butuma abantu bashobora kohereza amahera ya kuri internet bageza kuri mugenzi wabo, ata banki canke ishirahamwe bikenewe kugira ngo bifashe.
satoshisBreakthrough.title: Intsinzi ya Satoshi

Ikibabaje, si vyo neza. Bitcoin irashoboka kwiyongera mu gaciro mu gihe kubera ingano yayo igumye kandi igishakwa cayo gikura, mu gihe igiciro gikwega kigabanya agaciro k'amahera ya fiat.
nativelyDigital.question: Ni ikihe citandukaniye hagati y'amahera ya fiat ya kuri internet na Bitcoin?
nativelyDigital.text:
Amahera ya fiat ya kuri internet ni igishusho ca kuri internet c'ikintu cagizwe ku ntumbero y'ibihe vy'inganda. Afise ingorane n'imbibe zimwe n'ikintu c'umwimerere. Ni uburyo bwugarijwe bugenzurwa cane kandi bwagizwe kubura agaciro mu gihe.

Bitcoin ni ubwoko bw'amahera ya kuri internet yagizwe ku ntumbero y'ibihe vya kuri internet. Irashobora gutezwa imbere no guhindurwa, kandi umuntu wese arashobora kubona no guhindura kode yayo. Inungukira ku biyumviro n'ubuhanga bw'umuntu wese akora kuri yo.
nativelyDigital.title: Yagizwe ku Ntumbero y'Ibihe vya kuri Internet

Ewe musaza, ni inyishu nziza ariko ikibabaje si yo ibaye. CBDC ntigizwe kuba izikwiragiye canke izidabuza nka Bitcoin.
CBDCs.question: Intumbero nyamukuru y'amahera ya kuri internet y'amabanki nkuru (CBDC) ni iyihe?
CBDCs.text:
Amahera ya kuri internet y'amabanki nkuru (CBDC) ni igishusho ca kuri internet c'amahera bisanzwe asohorwa kandi ashigikiwe n'ibanki nkuru.

CBDC ntizikwiragiye canke ntizidabuza nka Bitcoin, ahubwo zagizwe guhiganira n'uburyo bundi bwo kwishura bwa kuri internet ku kubaho mu isoko.

Imwe mu mpamvu nyamukuru zo guteza imbere CBDC ni ubushobozi bwo gukurikirana no guhonyanga bitanga ku wasohose.

Vyongeye, mu bihe vy'inyungu zikoresha nabi (iyo igiciro gikwega kirenze inyungu), gufata CBDC mu buryo bwinshi kenshi bijana no gukuraho amahera agaragara, ivyo bishobora gutuma agaciro k'amahera agabanuka mu buryo bw'ukuri.
CBDCs.title: Amahera ya kuri Internet y'Amabanki Nkuru

Haha, naho bishobora kugoranwa gutwara amahera menshi, si co kibazo c'inkomoko c'amahera bisanzwe.
rootProblem.question: Ni ikihe kibazo c'inkomoko c'amahera bisanzwe nk'uko Satoshi Nakamoto abibona?
rootProblem.text:
None ni iyihe mpamvu yo gushiraho Bitcoin? Mu gutangaza umushinga wiwe, Satoshi Nakamoto yatanze insiguro ikurikira:

"Ikibazo c'inkomoko c'amahera bisanzwe ni ukwizera kwose gukenewe kugira ngo akore. Ibanki nkuru itegerezwa kwizerwako ko itogabanya agaciro k'amahera, ariko amateka y'amahera ya fiat yuzuye ukurenga ukwizera. Amabanki ategerezwa kwizerwako ko afata amahera yacu akayimura mu buryo bwa kuri internet, ariko ayaguranya mu biguruka vy'amadeni afise igice gito gusa mu kigega."
rootProblem.title: Ikibazo c'Inkomoko

answers: Umuproguramu atazwi yakoresheje izina ry'ibanga "Satoshi Nakamoto"
Craig Wright

feedback: Nibyo! Ni ikimenyamenya gishimishije, ariko bihambaye kubona ko kode ya bitcoin ishingiye ku kode usanzwe, bisobanura ko umuntu wese arashobora kuyisuzuma.
Turasaba imbabazi, ariko bisa n'uko ivyo Craig Wright avuga vy'uko ari we yashize bitcoin vyabaye ikinyoma. Hari amahirwe meza ejo.
Oya! Ubuhanga bwa Elon Musk bushobora kuba bwiza cane mu guturira ibisasu no gukora imodoka zikoreshwa n'amashanyarazi aho gukora amahera y'ihinduka ya kuri internet. Ongera ugerageze!
bitcoinCreator.question: Ni nde yashize bitcoin?
bitcoinCreator.text:
Uwashize bitcoin, yakoresheje izina ry'ibanga "Satoshi Nakamoto", ntazwi kandi nta muntu yemejwe ko ari we. Satoshi yarinjiye mu mushinga akanya gato gusa imbere yo gukuraho.

Kode ya bitcoin ishingiye ku kode usanzwe, bisobanura ko umuntu wese arashobora kuyisuzuma. Ibi bituma iba kode isuzumwe cane kuruta kw'isi yose. Naho uwayishize atazwi, bitcoin ubwayo ni umuyunganiro w'amahera ufunguye kandi utarimwo ibanga ushobora gusuzumwa no gukoreshwa n'umuntu wese.
bitcoinCreator.title: Uwashize Bitcoin Satoshi Nakamoto

Oya. Si vyo. Ongera ugerageze.
Igiciro gikwega kidateganijwe gitera n'abasohora abagenzura mu vyukuri ni ikibazo bitcoin ikemura mu buryo bwiza, ariko hari ikibazo c'ibanze cane Satoshi yakemura. Ongera ugerageze!
fiatRequiresTrust.question: Ni ikihe kibazo kinini Satoshi Nakamoto yashaka gukemura mu gushiraho bitcoin?
fiatRequiresTrust.text:
Uburyo bw'amahera ya fiat bwa nyuma ya 1971 busaba ukwizera ku rwego rwose kubera bushingiye ku madeni kandi budafise ikibiko kidasanzwe. Harimwo ukwizera mu bushobozi bwo kwishura amadeni muri kazoza, ukwizera mu mabanki y'ubucuruzi n'amabanki nkuru ko atagabanya agaciro k'amahera, n'ukwizera mu bushobozi bwayo bwo guha ubushobozi bwo gushikira no gukoresha amahera mu bikorwa.

Uku kwizera kwaravunijwe incuro nyinshi, harimwo mu gihe c'Ikibazo Kinini c'Amahera c'Isi mu 2008/09. Kugira ngo akemure iki kibazo, Satoshi Nakamoto yashaka gukora amahera ya kuri internet atasaba kwizera umuntu wa gatatu mu bikorwa kandi adashobora kugabanywa n'ubutegetsi bumwe busohora ibice vyinshi.
fiatRequiresTrust.title: Amahera ya Fiat Asaba Ukwizera

Bihambaye kubona ko ibi biguruka kenshi binungukira cane abari hafi y'inkomoko y'amahera mashasha, mu gihe abantu b'umushahara muto kenshi ari bo bagirwa nabi cane n'igiciro gikwega.
Uyu si umuyunganiro ubereye hano!
Igitegereza cawe ni c'ahandi. Naho gushimishije kwiyumvira ibinyabuzima byo mu kirere, nta sano gifise n'ingaruka zo gucapa amahera menshi.
moneyPrinting.question: Ni iyihe mwe mu ngaruka nyamukuru zo gucapa amahera menshi no kwagura amadeni?
moneyPrinting.text:
Gucapa amahera menshi no kwagura amadeni birashobora gutera ingorane nyinshi z'ubutunzi n'imibanire, harimwo ibiguruka vy'agaciro k'imitungo mu masoko y'amasheteri n'amazu bisanzwe bihinduka nk'buri myaka cumi.

Mu gihe abari hafi y'inkomoko y'amahera mashasha kenshi banungukira cane ibi biguruka, abantu b'umushahara muto badafise imitungo y'agaciro kandi bashingiye ku mushahara wa buri kwezi kenshi ari bo bagirwa nabi cane n'igiciro gikwega n'ibiguruka vy'ubutunzi bikorwa n'uburyo bw'amahera ya fiat.

Urugero rumenyerewe rw'ibi ni Ikibazo Kinini c'Amahera c'Isi catanguye mu 2008, imbere y'ico cari hashize guterana kw'amadeni n'akaga mu gice c'amabanki y'ubucuruzi.
moneyPrinting.title: Gucapa Amahera no Kwagura Amadeni

genesisBlock.question: Kubera iki Satoshi Nakamoto yashize Bitcoin?
genesisBlock.text:
Biragaragara kubera iki Satoshi Nakamoto yashize Bitcoin iyo dusuzumye igipande ca mbere c'umunyururu wa bloki ya Bitcoin, citwa igipande c'intango (Genesis block).

Iki gipande cashizweho na Satoshi igihe yatangura Bitcoin mu 2009 kandi kirimwo ikimenyetso c'amabanki yakira ubufasha nyuma y'Ikibazo Kinini c'Amahera c'Isi mu 2008/09.

"The Times 03/Jan/2009 Chancellor on the brink of second bailout for banks"

Iki kibazo, aho ukwizera mu buryo bisanzwe bw'amahera bwononekaye cane, catumye Satoshi ashiraho amahera ya kuri internet adasaba kwizera umuntu wa gatatu mu bikorwa kandi adashobora kugabanywa n'ubutegetsi bumwe busohora ibice vyinshi.
genesisBlock.title: Igipande c'Intango

answers: Cypherpunks ni umugwi w'abantu bashaka gukoresha ubuhanga bwo gufunga amakuru gutera imbere ibanga n'umutekano mu bihe vya kuri internet
Cypherpunks ni umugwi w'abajura ba kuri internet bashaka kwiba amakuru bwite biciye mu gukoresha ubuhanga bwo gufunga amakuru
Cypherpunks ni umugwi w'abahinga mu buhanga bwo gufunga amakuru bashaka gukora imibare igoye gukemura

Ikibabaje, si vyo neza.
Oya. Naho ubuhanga bwo gufunga amakuru burimwo gukoresha imibare igoye, Cypherpunks ntibakunda cane gukora iyi mibare kugira ngo ibe intumbero yayo bwite. Ongera ugerageze!
cypherpunks.question: Cypherpunks ni bande kandi intumbero yabo ni iyihe?
cypherpunks.text:
Bitcoin ni inyishu y'imyaka mirongo y'ubushakashatsi bw'umugwi w'abantu biyita Cypherpunks. Bashimishijwe no gukoresha ubuhanga bwo gufunga amakuru gutera imbere ibanga n'umutekano mu isi aho gukurikirana kwiyongera mu bihe vya kuri internet gushobora gutuma agateka gatakara.

Uburyo bwa kera bw'amahera ya kuri internet bwashingiye ku muyunganiro w'abantu babiri (P2P) bwari bufise ikibazo kimwe canke ibiri muri ibi:

  * Bwasaba ubutegetsi bumwe kugenzura inyandiko y'abantu.
  * Ibice vy'amahera vyashobora gukopiywa, bigatuma habaho "ikibazo co gukoresha kabiri" aho igice kimwe gishobora gukoreshwa incuro nyinshi.

  Satoshi yakemura ibi bibazo vyompi mu guhuza ubuhanga buriho mu gushiraho Bitcoin. Ikibazo ca mbere gikemurwa kubera imiterere ikwiragiye y'umuyunganiro wa Bitcoin isobanura ko ata butegetsi bumwe abakoresha bakeneye kwizera. Ikibazo ca kabiri gikemurwa kubera ubuhanga bwihariye bwo gufunga amakuru bukoreshwa muri Bitcoin butuma bidashoboka gukopiya ibice vy'amahera.
cypherpunks.title: Bitcoin ni Inyishu y'Imyaka Mirongo y'Ubushakashatsi

peer2Peer.question: Ni ubuhe buhinga Satoshi yakoresheje kugira ngo akemure ikibazo co gukoresha kabiri?
peer2Peer.text:
Satoshi Nakamoto ni we wa mbere yashize neza umunyururu wa bloki -- iciyumviro cavuzwe ubwa mbere mu 1991 na Stuart Haber na W. Scott Stornetta. Ni uburyo bwo kubika inyandiko bukwiragiye budashobora guhindurwa kandi buha abakoresha ubushobozi bwo gukora no gushimikiza ibikorwa ata butegetsi bumwe.

Umuyunganiro wa Bitcoin ufise ibice vyinshi bihuza kw'isi yose, buri kimwe gifise amakopi yuzuye y'umunyururu wa bloki. Ibi bituma umuyunganiro utagira ahantu hamwe ho kwonona kandi uguma uhindagurika.
peer2Peer.title: Ni ubuhe buhinga Satoshi yakoresheje kugira ngo akemure ikibazo co gukoresha kabiri?

blockchain.question: Umunyururu wa bloki ni iki?
blockchain.text:
Umunyururu wa bloki ni inyandiko ya kuri internet idashobora guhindurwa y'ibikorwa vyose vya Bitcoin. Ibonwa nk'igitabo kinini c'amahera cuzuye kandi c'umuntu wese ashobora kubona.

Ibikorwa bishasha bishirwa hamwe mu 'bipande' bihuzwa hamwe mu munyururu. Buri gipande gihuza n'igishize, bigatuma inyandiko idashobora guhindurwa.

Ibi bisobanura ko ntawushobora guhindura canke gusiba ikikorwa camaze gushimikizwa ku munyururu wa bloki.
blockchain.title: Umunyururu wa bloki ni iki?

privateKey.question: Igufunguro ry'ibanga ni iki?
privateKey.text:
Igufunguro ry'ibanga ni nk'ijambo ry'ibanga rya kuri internet rikureka gukoresha bitcoin zawe. Ni uburyo bwo kwemeza ko wewe ari we nyene ushobora kohereza bitcoin zawe.

Bihambaye cane kubika igufunguro ryawe ry'ibanga mu buryo bwizewe. Nimba umuntu aronse igufunguro ryawe ry'ibanga, ashobora kwiba bitcoin zawe zose. Kandi nimba uribuze, ntuzoshobora gushikira bitcoin zawe.

Ni nk'igufunguro ry'agasandugu kawe ka banki -- ariko ata banki ishobora kukugirira ubufasha nimba uribuze.
privateKey.title: Igufunguro ry'ibanga ni iki?

answers: Ni nk'aderesi y'imeri -- urashobora kuyisangira n'umuntu wese kugira ngo wakirane bitcoin
Ni nk'igufunguro ry'ibanga -- ntukwiye kuyisangira n'umuntu n'umwe
Ni nk'inomero ya konti ya banki -- ikoreshwa gusa na banki yawe
feedback: Nibyo! Igufunguro rusangi -- canke aderesi ya Bitcoin -- ni uburyo bwo kwakira bitcoin. Urashobora kuyisangira n'umuntu wese.
Ntibigoye. Igufunguro rusangi ritandukanye n'igufunguro ry'ibanga. Ongera ugerageze.
Sibyo. Ongera ugerageze.
publicKey.question: Igufunguro rusangi ni iki?
publicKey.text:
Igufunguro rusangi (canke aderesi ya Bitcoin) ni nk'aderesi y'imeri yawe -- urashobora kuyisangira n'umuntu wese kugira ngo wakirane bitcoin.

Igufunguro rusangi rikorwa bivuye ku gufunguro ry'ibanga biciye mu mibare igoye. Ariko, ntibigisha gukura igufunguro ry'ibanga bivuye mu gufunguro rusangi.

Ibi bisobanura ko urashobora gusangira aderesi yawe ya Bitcoin n'umuntu wese mu mutekano, udatinya ko umuntu ashobora kwiba amahera yawe.
publicKey.title: Igufunguro rusangi ni iki?
